allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "dir C:\\Users\\jacks\\Desktop && echo ---DOWNLOADS--- && dir C:\\Users\\jacks\\Downloads && echo ---DOCUMENTS--- && dir C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents\\Certifications' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents\\Installers' -Recurse | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents\\PC Drivers' -Recurse | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents\\Records' -Recurse | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\jacks\\Documents\\School' -Recurse | Select-Object Name")
